Title: Verify User Creation
Test Data:
- Valid name: John Doe
- Valid email: john.doe@example.com
- Valid password: Password123
Test Steps:
1. Navigate to the user registration page.
2. Enter the name "John Doe".
3. Enter the email "john.doe@example.com".
4. Enter the password "Password123".
5. Confirm the password.
6. Click the "Register" button.
Expected Result: The user account is created successfully.

Title: Verify User Login
Preconditions: A user account has been created.
Test Data:
- Valid email: john.doe@example.com
- Valid password: Password123
Test Steps:
1. Navigate to the login page.
2. Enter the email "john.doe@example.com".
3. Enter the password "Password123".
4. Click the "Login" button.
Expected Result: The user is logged in successfully.

Title: Verify User Role Change
Test Data:
- Valid email: john.doe@example.com
- Valid password: Password123
Test Steps:
1. Log in as the user "John Doe".
2. Navigate to the account settings page.
3. Change the user role from "Cliente" to "Venditore".
4. Save the changes.
Expected Result: The user role is changed from "Cliente" to "Venditore".

Title: Verify Push Notification
Preconditions: A user is logged in and has enabled push notifications.
Test Data: - Valid notification message: New product available!
Test Steps:
1. Log in as the user "John Doe".
2. Ensure push notifications are enabled.
3. Simulate a new product being added.
4. Check if a push notification is received.
Expected Result: A push notification is received with the message "New product available!".

Title: Verify In-App Notification
Preconditions: A user is logged in and has enabled in-app notifications.

Test Steps:

2. Ensure in-app notifications are enabled.
3. Simulate a new product being added.
4. Check if an in-app notification is displayed.
Expected Result: An in-app notification is displayed with the message "New product available!".

Title: Verify Client-Venditore Association
Preconditions: A user is logged in as a seller and a customer exists.
Test Data:
- Valid seller: John Doe (Seller)
- Valid customer: Jane Smith (Customer)
Test Steps:
1. Log in as the user "John Doe".
2. Navigate to the customer association page.
3. Associate the customer "Jane Smith" with the seller "John Doe".
4. Save the association.
Expected Result: The customer "Jane Smith" is associated with the seller "John Doe".

Title: Verify VenditorePreferito Association
Preconditions: A user is logged in as a customer and a seller exists.
Test Steps:
1. Log in as the user "Jane Smith".
2. Navigate to the seller preference page.
3. Add the seller "John Doe" as a preferred seller.
4. Save the preference.
Expected Result: The seller "John Doe" is added as a preferred seller for the customer "Jane Smith".
